title: error: no matching function for call to 'get'
body:
I've got the following error during the build:

```
[17/120] Building CXX object tools/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/CMakeFiles/obj.CIRCTFIRRTL.dir/FIRRTLTypes.cpp.o
FAILED: tools/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/CMakeFiles/obj.CIRCTFIRRTL.dir/FIRRTLTypes.cpp.o
/usr/bin/clang++ -D_GNU_SOURCE -D__STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS -D__STDC_FORMAT_MACROS -D__STDC_LIMIT_MACROS -Itools/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL -I/home/ryuta/packages/llvm/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL -Iinclude -I/home/ryuta/packages/llvm/llvm-project/llvm/include -I/home/ryuta/packages/llvm/circt/include -Itools/circt/include -isystem /home/ryuta/packages/llvm/llvm-project/llvm/../mlir/include -isystem tools/mlir/include -stdlib=libc++ -fPIC -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -Werror=date-time -Werror=unguarded-availability-new -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wwrite-strings -Wcast-qual -Wmissing-field-initializers -pedantic -Wno-long-long -Wimplicit-fallthrough -Wcovered-switch-default -Wno-noexcept-type -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wdelete-non-virtual-dtor -Wstring-conversion -fdiagnostics-color -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -flto=thin -O3 -DNDEBUG  -fno-exceptions -std=c++14 -MD -MT tools/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/CMakeFiles/obj.CIRCTFIRRTL.dir/FIRRTLTypes.cpp.o -MF tools/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/CMakeFiles/obj.CIRCTFIRRTL.dir/FIRRTLTypes.cpp.o.d -o tools/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/CMakeFiles/obj.CIRCTFIRRTL.dir/FIRRTLTypes.cpp.o -c /home/ryuta/packages/llvm/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/FIRRTLTypes.cpp
In file included from /home/ryuta/packages/llvm/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/FIRRTLTypes.cpp:14:
In file included from /home/ryuta/packages/llvm/circt/include/circt/Dialect/FIRRTL/FIRRTLOps.h:62:
tools/circt/include/circt/Dialect/FIRRTL/FIRRTL.h.inc:2448:27: error: no matching function for call to 'get'
      return getPortNamed(StringAttr::get(name, getContext()));
                          ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
/home/ryuta/packages/llvm/llvm-project/llvm/../mlir/include/mlir/IR/BuiltinAttributes.h:331:21: note: candidate function not viable: no known conversion from 'mlir::MLIRContext *' to 'mlir::Type' for 2nd argument
  static StringAttr get(StringRef bytes, Type type);
                    ^
/home/ryuta/packages/llvm/llvm-project/llvm/../mlir/include/mlir/IR/BuiltinAttributes.h:328:21: note: candidate function not viable: no known conversion from 'llvm::StringRef' to 'mlir::MLIRContext *' for 1st argument
  static StringAttr get(MLIRContext *context, StringRef bytes);
                    ^
1 error generated.
```

Here's how I build

```
cmake \
  -G Ninja \
  -B llvm-build \
  -S llvm-project/llvm \
  -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS:BOOL=ON \
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=$HOME/local \
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_RPATH:PATH=$HOME/local/lib \
  -DCMAKE_BUILD_WITH_INSTALL_RPATH:BOOL=ON \
  -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Release \
  -DLLVM_TARGETS_TO_BUILD:STRING=X86 \
  -DLLVM_ENABLE_PROJECTS:STRING="clang;clang-tools-extra;compiler-rt;lld;lldb;libcxx;libcxxabi;libunwind;mlir;flang;openmp" \
  -DLLVM_ENABLE_LIBCXX:BOOL=ON \
  -DLLVM_ENABLE_LLD:BOOL=ON \
  -DLLVM_ENABLE_LTO:STRING=Thin \
  -DLLVM_ENABLE_RTTI:BOOL=ON \
  -DLLVM_ENABLE_FFI:BOOL=OFF \
  -DLLVM_ENABLE_SPHINX:BOOL=OFF \
  -DLLVM_ENABLE_DOXYGEN:BOOL=OFF \
  -DLLVM_TOOL_GOLD_BUILD:BOOL=OFF \
  -DLLVM_INSTALL_UTILS:BOOL=ON \
  -DLLVM_BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=ON \
  -DLLVM_OPTIMIZED_TABLEGEN:BOOL=ON \
  -DLLVM_EXTERNAL_PROJECTS:STRING="circt;mlir-npcomp" \
  -DLLVM_EXTERNAL_CIRCT_SOURCE_DIR:PATH=$HOME/packages/llvm/circt \
  -DLLVM_EXTERNAL_MLIR_NPCOMP_SOURCE_DIR:PATH=$HOME/packages/llvm/mlir-npcomp \
  -DMLIR_BINDINGS_PYTHON_ENABLED:BOOL=ON \
  -DCLANG_DEFAULT_LINKER:STRING=lld \
  -DCLANG_DEFAULT_CXX_STDLIB:STRING=libc++ \
  -DCLANG_DEFAULT_RTLIB:STRING=compiler-rt \
  -DCLANG_DEFAULT_UNWINDLIB:STRING=libunwind \
  -DFLANG_BUILD_NEW_DRIVER:BOOL=ON \
  -DCOMPILER_RT_INCLUDE_TESTS:BOOL=ON \
  -DCOMPILER_RT_USE_BUILTINS_LIBRARY:BOOL=ON \
  -DLIBUNWIND_USE_COMPILER_RT:BOOL=ON \
  -DLIBCXXABI_USE_COMPILER_RT:BOOL=ON \
  -DLIBCXXABI_USE_LLVM_UNWINDER:BOOL=ON \
  -DLIBCXX_USE_COMPILER_RT:BOOL=ON \
  -DLIBCXX_CXX_ABI:STRING=libcxxabi \
  -DLIBCXXABI_USE_LLVM_UNWINDER:BOOL=ON \
  -DNPCOMP_ENABLE_IREE:BOOL=ON \
  -DNPCOMP_ENABLE_PYTORCH:STRING=OFF
```
